message:
test(e2e): add NTM ingest + WS bridge E2E tests (bd-1vr1.14)

Add E2E tests for NTM ingest pipeline and WebSocket bridge covering:
- NTM availability detection via health endpoint
- System snapshot data structure validation
- Agent discovery and state tracking (when NTM available)
- Agent output accessibility
- WebSocket connection and subscription
- NTM state change event structure via WS bridge
- Diagnostics for NTM absence (cascade failures, root cause paths)

Tests skip gracefully with explicit diagnostic logs when NTM is not
installed, including a prerequisites checklist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
